title: Mascot IP Brand Collab
description: Imagine premium brand collaborations between mascots and recognizable IP characters, spanning key art, packaging, in-store display, and social promo assets.

zh-CN.title: 品牌吉祥物联名 IP
zh-CN.description: 把品牌 mascot 和热门角色做成官方联名视觉，兼顾包装、门店陈列、海报和社媒宣传资产。
